label: Exa
description: Neural web search built for AI agents — query the web semantically and get clean, structured results.

form.title: Connect Exa
form.subtitle: Paste your Exa API key to give Anton neural web-search capabilities.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Exa API key from the dashboard. No OAuth flow needed — copy and done.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Exa API key

1. Open [dashboard.exa.ai](https://dashboard.exa.ai) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. In the left sidebar, click **API Keys**.
3. Click **Create API Key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and confirm.
4. Copy the key shown — it will not be displayed again.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Keys are project-scoped. If you belong to multiple Exa workspaces, make sure you're in the right one before creating the key.
- To revoke access later, return to **API Keys** in the dashboard, find the `Anton` key, and delete it.
- Check your plan's monthly search credit limit under **Billing** — Anton will surface API quota errors if you hit the cap.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at dashboard.exa.ai → API Keys. Shown only once — store it safely.
